notes: Train-only Spearman correlation ranking pruned by greedy Spearman threshold.

Hybrid set. HIE stability is measured on unpruned HIE union top-K across early/mid/late train blocks. Spearman pruning is applied only at the final feature-set construction stage. HIE audit reports raw corr ranks to distinguish HIE-distinct features from corr-accessible features removed by pruning.
